gpt-image-1.5.prompt:
A slightly cluttered bedroom during twilight with authentic domestic atmosphere. A beige upholstered armchair with dark clothing draped over it, an unmade bed with rumpled grey sheets, a wooden bedside table, and a window revealing deep blue dusk sky.

An East Asian woman with short black bob-cut hair with soft texture takes a mirror selfie from a side-profile perspective. She has delicate facial structure with sharp winged eyeliner, slightly parted natural lips, and a focused expression looking into the mirror reflection.

Her body has a hyper-pronounced hourglass silhouette with a high waist-to-hip ratio, significant gluteal volume, extremely narrow and toned waist, lean midsection with visible iliac crest, and smooth skin texture with realistic anatomical shadows.

She wears a kelly green cotton twill baseball cap with a white 'XBOX' logo on the front panel. Her kelly green minimalist micro-string bikini has a triangle top with 'XBOX' text printed in black sans-serif on the lateral side, and high-leg string bottoms emphasizing hip curvature.

Her torso is slightly rotated toward the mirror to capture her side and rear silhouette, with one arm raised holding a grey smartphone at eye level.

Dual-tone mixed lighting fills the scene: warm golden 2700K glow from a bedside lamp creates soft highlights on her skin, while cool 6500K blue-hour natural light through the window adds subtle rim light on her hair and silhouette. Natural soft-edged shadows emphasize body contours.

Mobile phone camera quality with slight natural grain and realistic ISO noise in shadow areas. No beautify smoothing. No artificial skin glow. Realistic texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

She wears a kelly green cotton twill baseball cap with white XBOX logo and matching kelly green micro-string bikini with XBOX text on the triangle top and high-leg string bottoms. The bedroom shows a beige armchair with draped clothing, unmade bed with grey sheets, and a window with deep blue dusk sky. seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: An East Asian woman with short black bob-cut hair takes a mirror selfie in a slightly cluttered bedroom at twilight. She has delicate facial structure with sharp winged eyeliner, slightly parted lips, and a focused expression. Her body has a hyper-pronounced hourglass silhouette with narrow toned waist and significant gluteal volume. She wears a kelly green cotton twill baseball cap with white XBOX logo and matching kelly green micro-string bikini with XBOX text printed on the triangle top and high-leg string bottoms. She stands in a side-profile pose with torso rotated toward the mirror, arm raised holding a grey smartphone. The room has a beige armchair with draped clothing, unmade bed with rumpled grey sheets, and a window showing deep blue dusk sky. Dual-tone mixed lighting: warm 2700K lamp glow and cool 6500K blue-hour window light creating rim lighting. Mobile phone candid aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the Xbox cap and bikini color from kelly green to hot pink while keeping the woman in the exact same side-profile mirror selfie pose. Preserve the XBOX logo branding, her short black bob, winged eyeliner, hourglass silhouette, the cluttered bedroom setting, and the dual-tone warm lamp and cool window lighting.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed branded items (Xbox cap and bikini), precise body anatomy, specific lighting temperatures (2700K vs 6500K)

3_technical_camera: '26mm wide', 'f/1.8', 'mobile phone simulation', 'natural grain', 'ISO noise in shadows'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents beautify smoothing, extra limbs, distorted reflections
5_spatial_consistency: clear side-profile mirror pose with reflection alignment rules
7_mirror_rules: explicit reflection integrity (alignment, lighting consistency, surface imperfections)
